# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for istio authz bypass and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access-control
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET"]
            paths: ["/api/v1/products", "/api/v1/categories"]
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST"]
            paths: ["/api/v1/orders", "/api/v1/orders/*"]
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/admin-service"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
            paths: ["/api/v1/admin", "/api/v1/admin/*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notPrincipals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service"
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service"
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/admin-service"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/order-service"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["POST"]
            paths: ["/api/v1/payments/process"]
      when:
        - key: request.headers[x-request-id]
          notValues: [""]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service"
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET"]
            paths: ["/api/v1/users/profile"]
            notPaths: ["/api/v1/users/admin", "/api/v1/users/admin/*"]
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/production/sa/admin-service"
            namespaces:
              - "production"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET", "PUT", "DELETE"]
            paths: ["/api/v1/users", "/api/v1/users/*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: strict-mtls
  namespace: production
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: health-check-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - to:
        - operation:
            methods: ["GET"]
            paths: ["/healthz", "/readyz"]
